true_header: In this agreement, the following definitions shall apply:
Information  which  the  receiving  party  can  show  was  in  its  possession  on  a  non- confidential basis before receipt of the information from the disclosing party;
Information  which  is  lawfully  in  the  public  domain  at  the  time  of  the  receiving  party’s receipt  of  the  information  from  the  disclosing  party,
Responding to the company’s request for proposals for the project,
Assessing the contractor’s proposal, in the case of the company; and
Except  as  expressly  permitted  by  this  agreement,
Executed appendix a – permitted recipient’s acknowledgement; or
Are  bound  in  writing  by  confidentiality  terms,
The receiving party shall immediately notify the disclosing party, in writing,
This agreement is not intended to and does not obligate either party:
To disclose any specific confidential information; or
To enter into any subsequent business arrangements regarding the permitted purpose or any other matter.
This agreement does not create any exclusivity between the parties;
Term and return or destruction of confidential information
Return  to  the  disclosing  party  or  destroy  all  of  the  disclosing  party’s  original  tangible confidential information,

Safeguard  any  electronic  confidential  information  that  cannot  be  destroyed  due  to  the receiving party’s archiving practices or policies with the same degree of care as it would its own confidential information;
Retain  electronic  confidential  information  described  in  subsection  5.
Upon request of the disclosing party,
Each party shall pay its own costs and expenses incurred in connection with this agreement.
Should either party change its address while the agreement is in effect,
This agreement  is not  intended to and  does not grant,
To  the  extent  that  any  statute,
In this agreement, unless the context requires otherwise,
Any activities related to the assessment of any submission for the project; and
Any related exchanges of information, clarifications, clearances, discussions, due diligence,
Hold the information in confidence and,
At the request and direction of the disclosing party, and without delay,
The obligations set out in clause 2 shall not apply to information that:
The receiving party can prove (using written or electronic records),
Co-operate with the disclosing party with respect to such matters,
The department of business, innovation and skills (or other relevant government department),
Constitutes an offer by or on behalf of the disclosing party; or
If any provision of this agreement is or becomes illegal,
This agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts,
"affiliate" means with respect to any person,
Agreement means this non-disclosure agreement including all appendices (if any).
Client  means any customers or business partners of the party;
Effective date means the date when the last of the parties signed the agreement.
Project has the meaning ascribed to it in clause 4.1.
Use confidential information only for the project;
Was, at the time of its disclosure,
Breach by recipient of its obligations contained in this agreement (or by any person to whom disclosure of information is made as permitted under this agreement);
Breach by a third party of any other obligation or duty of confidentiality or non- disclosure relating to that information that recipient is or ought to be aware of;
Is required to be disclosed by law,
Inform discloser of the circumstances of the disclosure and the information that will be disclosed as soon as reasonably practicable;
Permit discloser in its absolute discretion to seek to obtain an injunction or take other appropriate action to protect the confidential information;
Take all such steps as may be reasonable and practicable in the circumstances to agree the form,
Consult with discloser as to possible steps to prevent or limit such disclosure and take those steps to the extent reasonably practicable in the circumstances,
Request assurances as to confidentiality from anybody to which the confidential information is to be disclosed.
With respect to the confidential information disclosed,
If recipient discloses or distributes confidential information to any of its representatives,
Upon discloser s request, recipient shall promptly,
Insert the other party’s name or company name ,
Each  party  wishes  to  disclose  to  the  other  party  confidential  information  in  relation  to  the purpose.
In consideration of the benefits to the parties of the disclosure of the confidential information,
Now it is hereby agreed as follows: -
The fact that discussions and negotiations are taking place concerning the purpose and the status of those discussions and negotiations;
The existence and terms of this agreement;
The  business,  affairs,  customers,  clients,  suppliers,
The  operations,  processes,  product  information,  know-how,
Any information or analysis derived from confidential information.
To keep secret and confidential all confidential information of the disclosing party;

To use or apply the confidential information of the  disclosing  party solely for the purpose and  so  as  to  determine  whether  or  not  and  on  what  terms  the  parties  might  wish  to proceed;
Not to use, copy, adapt, alter,
To  provide  proper  and  secure  storage  for  each  and  every  part  of  the  confidential information received by it in tangible form whilst it is in its custody,

To return  or  destroy  or  if  stored  in  electronic  form  to erase  from  its systems  (to the  extent possible)  at  its  own  expense  the  confidential  information  of  the  disclosing  party  together with any copies in its possession or in the possession of its representatives at the request of the disclosing party.

Is  or  becomes  generally  available  to  the  public  other  than  as  a  result  of  its  disclosure  by the  recipient  party  or  its  representatives  in  breach  of  this  agreement  or  of  any  other undertaking of confidentiality addressed to the party to whom the information relates;
Is  in  its  possession  or  known  to  it  by  being  in  its  use  or  being  recorded  in  its  files  or computers  or  other  recording  media,
Was obtained legally from any third party,
Is  developed  by  the  recipient  party  independently  of  the  information  disclosed  by  the disclosing party.
The recipient party may disclose confidential information to the extent required:
By any  order  of any court  of competent jurisdiction or any competent judicial,
By  the  rules  of  any  listing  authority,
No rights in and no warranty on confidential information
If  either  party  decides  not  to become,
Information relating to the existence of this agreement;
Information which was known by a party prior to receiving it from the other party if this can be demonstrated by written record;
Information which at the time of disclosure is in the public domain or which is published after disclosure or otherwise becomes part of  the public domain without breach of this agreement;
Information which the party can show was received from a third party who did not to the best knowledge of the party receive the information,
Information developed or created by one party independently of the other,
Information which is disclosed due to any requirement under mandatory law.
To treat all confidential information as absolutely secret, private and confidential;
To take all steps necessary to preserve such confidentiality and secrecy;
To prevent disclosure of any such confidential information to any third party;
To use the confidential information solely for the purpose set out in section 1;
To disclose the confidential information only to those of its directors,
To ascertain that each person who receives confidential information is made aware of and comply with this agreement;
To immediately upon request deliver to the other party all confidential information that belong to that party in any form without retaining any copies thereof,
This agreement shall be governed by the substantive laws of sweden.
This agreement enters into force when signed by both parties.
